Main: TWFE (cluster): Main country and year fixed effects estimate with clustered SEs.
Country FE only: Alternative control set with country fixed effects only.
Year FE only: Alternative control set with year fixed effects only.
Log Fertility (TWFE): Alternative functional form using the log of fertility.
No Mali: Alternative sample excluding Mali to test sample sensitivity.
Future Enrollment Placebo: Identification-relevant placebo test using next-year enrollment.
Main: TWFE (HC1): Alternative inference using heteroskedasticity-robust SEs instead of clustering.
